chunks.en: Good morning everyone, here is my quick standup update for today.
chunks.ja: みなさんおはようございます、今日の私の手短なスタンドアップ報告です。

chunks.en: Yesterday I finished the login bug fix and pushed my code.
chunks.ja: 昨日はログインのバグ修正を終えて、コードをプッシュしました。

chunks.en: Today I plan to write tests for the new search feature.
chunks.ja: 今日は新しい検索機能のテストを書く予定です。

chunks.en: The problem I'm stuck on is a slow database query.
chunks.ja: 私が詰まっている問題は、データベースのクエリが遅いことです。

chunks.en: I might ask Kenji for help with this query later today.
chunks.ja: この件について、今日あとでケンジさんに助けを求めるかもしれません。

chunks.en: Our standup usually takes about ten minutes, so that's all from me.
chunks.ja: 私たちのスタンドアップはたいてい10分くらいなので、私からは以上です。

outline: Opening: greet and start the standup
Point 1: finished login bug fix yesterday
Point 2: today write tests, but stuck on slow query
Wrap-up: ask for help, standup is short

modelTalk.text: Hi everyone, here's my quick update. Yesterday I finished the login page for our app. I fixed two bugs, and I tested it many times. It works well now, so I feel happy about that. Today I want to start the new home screen. I'll also write some notes for my teammate. Plus, I need to answer a few emails. There's one problem I'm stuck on. My code is slow when it loads the user list. I don't know why yet, so I need some help. Maybe someone here can look at it with me later. Our standup is usually short. It takes about ten or fifteen minutes. We each talk for one or two minutes, and then we're done. I like it because it's quick and clear. That's all from me today. Thanks for listening, and let's have a good day!

chunks.en: In my standup update, I want to share what I did yesterday.
chunks.ja: スタンドアップの報告では、昨日やったことを共有したいと思います。

chunks.en: Yesterday I finished fixing the login bug that kept crashing the app.
chunks.ja: 昨日は、アプリを落とし続けていたログインのバグを直し終えました。

chunks.en: Today I plan to write tests for the new payment feature.
chunks.ja: 今日は、新しい決済機能のテストを書く予定です。

chunks.en: The problem I'm stuck on is a slow database query that times out.
chunks.ja: 詰まっているのは、タイムアウトしてしまう遅いデータベースのクエリです。

chunks.en: Our standup usually takes about ten minutes, so I'll keep it short.
chunks.ja: うちのスタンドアップはだいたい10分くらいなので、手短にします。

outline: Point 1: finished the login bug fix yesterday
Point 2: today's plan and the slow query I'm stuck on
Wrap-up: standup is short, around ten minutes

modelTalk.text: Hi everyone, here's my quick update for today. Yesterday I finished the login page, and I fixed two small bugs that kept coming back. I also wrote some tests, so I feel pretty good about that part. Today I want to start on the new settings screen, and I'll clean up the code we talked about last week. After lunch, I'll try to write the notes for it too. There's one thing I'm still stuck on. My test keeps failing, and I can't figure out why. Maybe someone can look at it with me later. Oh, and about our standup, it usually takes around ten or fifteen minutes. We try to keep it short, so we don't waste time. If it runs long, we just move the details to a chat. That's all from me, thanks for listening!
